RELIANCE.title: Reliance Industries Q3 profit rises 12% on retail and Jio growth
RELIANCE.summary: RIL reported stronger EBITDA in digital services and retail segments. Management guided continued capex in green energy while maintaining dividend policy.

RELIANCE.title: Analysts upgrade Reliance citing refining margin recovery
RELIANCE.summary: Brokerages raised target prices after O2C margin expansion and stable crude spreads. Multiple firms cite Jio ARPU tailwinds.

RELIANCE.title: Reliance faces regulatory scrutiny on retail pricing practices
RELIANCE.summary: CCI review of competitive practices in FMCG retail could create near-term overhang. Legal experts expect prolonged proceedings.

RELIANCE.title: RBI holds rates steady; bond yields edge lower
RELIANCE.summary: Policy unchanged at 6.5%. Governor noted balanced inflation outlook. Banking stocks mixed on NIM commentary.

RELIANCE.title: FIIs turn net buyers in Indian equities for third straight session
RELIANCE.summary: Foreign portfolio investors bought $420M net. Large-cap energy and financials led inflows according to exchange data.

RELIANCE.title: Crude oil volatility rises on Middle East supply concerns
RELIANCE.summary: Brent jumped 2.1% intraday. Refiners may see margin pressure if spike sustains beyond two weeks.

RELIANCE.title: Reliance New Energy announces solar module partnership
RELIANCE.summary: Strategic tie-up supports 20GW manufacturing roadmap. Street views announcement as long-dated optionality.

RELIANCE.title: India CPI cools to 4.9% within RBI comfort band
RELIANCE.summary: Food inflation moderated. Core CPI stable. Macro desk sees lower probability of near-term rate hike.

NIFTY.title: Nifty 50 closes at record high on broad-based rally
NIFTY.summary: Index gained 0.8% with 38 advancers. Bank Nifty outperformed on strong credit growth data.

NIFTY.title: IT stocks drag Nifty as US client spending worries resurface
NIFTY.summary: Nifty IT index fell 1.4%. Revenue guidance cuts from global peers weighed on sentiment.

NIFTY.title: RBI liquidity infusion supports short-end yields
NIFTY.summary: System liquidity surplus at 1.8 lakh crore. Traders expect range-bound index action near highs.

NIFTY.title: India manufacturing PMI expands for fifth month
NIFTY.summary: New orders index improved. Export orders stable. Macro strategists maintain constructive GDP view.

NIFTY.title: Geopolitical tensions spark risk-off move in Asian markets
NIFTY.summary: VIX India rose 6%. Defensive sectors outperformed. Hedging demand picked up in index options.

NIFTY.title: Mutual funds add ₹8,200 crore to equities in January
NIFTY.summary: SIP inflows remained robust. Domestic institutional support cited as cushion against FII volatility.

DEFAULT.title: Indian equities open flat ahead of inflation print
DEFAULT.summary: Traders cautious before data release. Rupee stable. Bond market muted.

DEFAULT.title: RBI minutes signal data-dependent policy stance
DEFAULT.summary: Committee noted upside risks to food prices. Rate path remains pause-heavy.

DEFAULT.title: Banking sector NPAs at multi-year lows per RBI report
DEFAULT.summary: Asset quality improved across public and private lenders. Credit growth at 16% YoY.

DEFAULT.title: Global bond yields climb on resilient US payrolls
DEFAULT.summary: Emerging market flows under pressure. EM FX weakened against dollar.

DEFAULT.title: SEBI tightens disclosure norms for SME listings
DEFAULT.summary: New rules effective next quarter. Compliance costs may rise for smaller issuers.
